rule: Use only existing SEC8K event panel and existing daily Databento price artifact.
Measure only the 5 trading sessions ending at t-1 before the reaction session.
Use the prior 20 trading sessions before the pre-window as baseline.
Candidate only if event median signed pre-window return is above control median.
Candidate only if event median absolute pre-window return is above control median.
Candidate only if event median pre-window volume ratio is above control median.
No candidate if event count is below 30.
Promotion impossible in this diagnostic artifact.
